name: Alex Kim
headline: Senior Platform Engineer
summary: Platform engineer focused on deployment reliability, infrastructure standardization, and operational clarity. I help product teams ship faster and safer by turning shared infrastructure patterns, rollout guardrails, and observability practices into durable team defaults.

bullets: Reworked shared infrastructure provisioning around reusable Terraform modules to reduce environment drift and manual configuration.
Defined Kubernetes 운영 기준 and deployment guardrails that lowered launch risk for new services and improved incident response speed.
Documented platform adoption rationale and operating rules so engineering teams could treat infrastructure as self-service instead of request-driven work.
Standardized CI/CD and observability settings so backend and data workloads ran against the same operational baseline.
Structured on-call playbooks, alert priorities, and incident response guidance for the teams that depended on the platform.

projects.name: Service Bootstrap Platform
projects.subtitle: Golden path for internal engineering teams
bullets: Packaged deployment, secret management, and observability setup so new services could start with the same operating model.
Combined documentation and checklists to reduce onboarding time and keep operational quality consistent across teams.
